label: SES-038 v0.6 slice B build-execution closeout: 1 session, 0 decisions, 0 planning items, 4 references

session.title: v0.6 slice B — sidebar + master-pane delegate
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code conversation opened against PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-B-sidebar-and-master-pane.md, the second of six v0.6 slice prompts. Delivered the shared selected-state visual vocabulary per DEC-093 (3px left accent bar + tinted background) across both the sidebar and every panel's master-pane row rendering. Landed at commit 86d9072 on 05-18-26 at 02:32 ET, immediately after slice A.
session.topics_covered:
Seed prompt: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-B-sidebar-and-master-pane.md. This conversation delivered the shared selected-state visual vocabulary that defines v0.6's most visible behavior: a 3px color.accent.default left bar plus color.accent.subtle background plus medium-weight text, rendered identically whether the row lives in the sidebar or in a panel's master view.

Sidebar work in ui/sidebar.py landed the 220px column with color.neutral.100 background and a right-edge hairline divider per design pass §2.1. The earlier uppercased group headers retired in favor of sentence-cased renderings (e.g., 'Methodology') at semibold caption size with color.neutral.500 and +0.04em letter-spacing so the visual still reads as small-caps-style without the uppercase typographic baggage. Entries render at 32px row height with body-size text; the stale-indicator dot recolored from legacy #1F3864 to color.accent.default (#1F5FBF). SidebarItemDelegate handles selected/hover state via custom paint per DEC-093.

Master-pane delegate in ui/widgets/master_pane_delegate.py is the shared component: MasterPaneDelegate(QStyledItemDelegate) handles row height (28px), 1px color.neutral.200 dividers, hover/selected/focused state, soft-deleted-row treatment (color.neutral.500 text + leading Lucide trash-2 icon in the identifier column), and the identifier-column mono font (JetBrains Mono at font.size.small). MasterPaneTreeDelegate(MasterPaneDelegate) exposes paint_branch() for tree views; the branch indicator renders as Lucide chevron-right/chevron-down. Decoupled from any specific model API via injected record_for_index + is_soft_deleted callables.

Notable findings: (1) the slice-A-anticipated Engagements/Engagements label collision (group header shares text with the panel entry) was navigated by rewiring select_entry/set_stale/is_stale through a new _entry_for_label() lookup that skips header items — so the shared label still routes to the entry rather than the same-named header; (2) registration via ListDetailPanel's master_pane_delegate_cls class attribute proved sufficient for all 13 panels because VersionedPanel turned out to be a ListDetailPanel subclass (Charter and Status inherit the delegate automatically) — the slice prompt's anticipated VersionedPanel fallback was no-work; (3) Topics panel overrides to MasterPaneTreeDelegate with a new _LucideChevronTreeView subclass that overrides drawBranches to paint the chevron icons plus indentation set to 16px. Six panel sidebar tests + test_smoke.py updated to assert sentence-cased headers and to distinguish header from entry via per-item header role rather than text case. Test suite: 1236 passed, 1 skipped.
session.artifacts_produced: Committed at 86d9072: crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/sidebar.py (220px column with sentence-cased headers, SidebarItemDelegate, _entry_for_label() lookup); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/widgets/master_pane_delegate.py (new — MasterPaneDelegate + MasterPaneTreeDelegate); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/base/list_detail_panel.py (master_pane_delegate_cls class attribute + delegate instantiation hook); crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/ui/panels/topics.py (MasterPaneTreeDelegate override + _LucideChevronTreeView subclass); six panel sidebar tests + tests/crmbuilder_v2/ui/test_smoke.py updated for sentence-case + header role.
session.in_flight_at_end: Slice C (panel retrofits + ReferencesSection rewrite per CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.6-C-panel-retrofits.md) was next on the queue. A follow-up palette-fix conversation actually landed AFTER slice C in commit order — see SES-040.
